scenarios.q: Incoming fire from an unidentified high-rise. Visual contact not established. Priority?

options.text: Seek immediate hard cover and establish communication link
Return suppressive fire towards the general direction
Hold position and wait for thermal scan overlay
Advance to next objective point under smoke screen

scenarios.q: Ambush in a narrow corridor. Two teammates down. Low visibility. Action?

options.text: Deploy defensive perimeter and initiate tactical extraction
Secure the immediate sector and call for medivac
Suppress fire while dragging personnel to cover
Counter-attack blindly to break the ambush line

scenarios.q: Sentry position. Motion detected in the gray zone. 02:00 hours. Protocol?

options.text: Activate silent alert and verify via NVD
Illuminate target area with flare and report
Verbal challenge from a covered position
Fire warning shots to deter movement

scenarios.q: Rooftop observation. Civilian group moving toward restricted zone. Decision?

options.text: Alert ground patrol for non-lethal redirection
Monitor movement and wait for direct breach
Broadcast audio warning in local dialect
Assume hostile intent and prepare kinetic response

scenarios.q: Conflicting intelligence regarding target location. Time is critical. Move?

options.text: Cross-reference with secondary drone feed before deployment
Split the unit to cover both suspected locations
Proceed to the most probable site with high caution
Abort mission until 100% confirmation is received

scenarios.q: Urban CQB. Hostage identified near high-value target. ROE status?

options.text: Switch to precision semi-auto; prioritize hostage safety
Request flashbang deployment for controlled entry
Bypass the room and seal all exits
Full auto suppression to neutralize the room

scenarios.text_variant: Neutralize electronic interference or stabilize team morale?
scenarios.q: Critical system failure during exfiltration. Team morale dropping. Focus?

options.text: Execute manual override while maintaining calm command
Delegate technical fix and focus on perimeter security
Prioritize immediate exit regardless of tech status
Publicly express concern to alert command of danger

scenarios.q: Intercepted comms suggest a mole in the local support. Response?

options.text: Isolate critical info and feed controlled misinformation
Cut all ties with local support immediately
Monitor support staff without changing routines
Direct confrontation to identify the leak

scenarios.q: Non-combatant picking up a discarded weapon. Distance 50m. Engagement?

options.text: Assess intent; maintain visual lock without firing
Warning shot to the side of the individual
Shout verbal commands to drop the weapon
Eliminate target as an immediate threat

scenarios.q: Checkpoint Alpha. Vehicle accelerating but not stopping. Protocol?

options.text: Deploy spike strips and fire at engine block
Fire warning shots into the air
Evacuate the checkpoint line immediately
Lethal fire at the driver cabin

scenarios.q: Unmarked drone hovering above the medical tent. Neutralization?

options.text: Deploy electronic jammer and notify command
Physical shoot-down with small arms
Relocate personnel inside the tent for safety
Ignore unless kinetic movement is detected

scenarios.q: Armed group approaching with a white flag, but weapons are leveled. Intent?

options.text: Demand weapons be grounded before negotiation
Hold fire but keep targets in primary sight
Advance to meet them half-way for visibility
Open fire due to weapon positioning breach

scenarios.q: Long-range overwatch. High wind speed, target moving intermittently. Precision shot?

options.text: Exhale halfway, stabilize core, and time shot between gusts
Wait for target to stop completely before adjusting windage
Increase grip pressure to compensate for rifle sway
Rapid fire to increase probability of a kinetic hit

scenarios.q: Breaching a heavy door. Adrenaline surge causing hand tremors. Stability?

options.text: Execute tactile grounding (grip check) and focus on 11s breath
Request a teammate to take the point to avoid delay
Proceed with the breach using momentum to mask tremors
Force entry immediately to bypass the physiological spike

scenarios.q: IED Defusal. Wire identification requires extreme micro-motor control. Action?

options.text: Isolate distal muscle groups; synchronize movement with exhale
Use mechanical stabilizers to hold the primary housing
Cut quickly to minimize the duration of exposure
Apply cooling agent to fingers to reduce nerve sensitivity

scenarios.q: Navigating a pitch-black crawlspace. Sensory deprivation causing dizziness. Focus?

options.text: Maintain 3 points of contact; internalize rhythmic breathing
Increase speed to reach the exit as fast as possible
Utilize white light intermittently to recalibrate vision
Stop movement and wait for external signal guidance

scenarios.q: Entering a room: 3 figures. 1 armed, 1 surrendering, 1 reaching for a phone. Priority?

options.text: Neutralize armed threat; vocal commands for the other two
Secure all individuals on the floor simultaneously
Flashbang entry to reset all occupants' cognitive load
Eliminate target with the phone to prevent data leak

scenarios.q: Sudden power cut in the command center. Multiple alarms sounding. Response?

options.text: Silent scan of perimeter; prioritize life-support systems
Reboot primary servers while maintaining backup light
Evacuate non-essential personnel to the rally point
Broadcast an all-clear to prevent mass panic

scenarios.q: A vehicle swerves into your convoy's path. Driver appears unconscious. Action?

options.text: Controlled maneuver to intercept/stop; maintain security
Veer off-road to avoid any contact with the vehicle
Ram the vehicle out of the path to maintain speed
Stop the entire convoy and dismount for inspection

scenarios.q: Friendly fire incident reported in the adjacent sector. Comms jammed. Decision?

options.text: Deploy physical signal (flare/strobe); hold fire immediately
Send a runner to the sector to verify status manually
Continue mission but change frequency to clear jamming
Fire into the air to alert all units to stop movement

scenarios.q: Radio reporting 3 different crises. Tech failure, injured civilian, and ammo low. Focus?

options.text: Address ammo status first to ensure defense capability
Delegate tech fix; treat civilian while reloading
Request immediate extraction to regroup all assets
Ignore the radio to focus on the immediate physical threat

scenarios.q: Navigating a minefield while under light sniper fire. Task prioritization?

options.text: Identify hard cover; move only after path verification
Sprint to the nearest cover regardless of the ground
Return fire while crawling slowly through the field
Lay flat and wait for smoke cover to be deployed

scenarios.q: You are the acting lead. Two contradicting orders from Command. Choice?

options.text: Execute the order that preserves the mission and lives
Hold position and demand a single clear directive
Follow the first order received chronologically
Follow the order from the highest-ranking officer only

scenarios.q: Hostile prisoner claiming to have info on an imminent attack. Veracity?

options.text: Cross-check details with known intel; keep prisoner isolated
Believe the info and redirect forces immediately
Use aggressive interrogation to confirm the data
Discard the info as a tactical distraction/trap

scenarios.q: Extreme heat during covert surveillance. Dehydration onset detected. Action?

options.text: Regulate breathing to 11s cycle; small sips of electrolyte fluid
Request immediate relief from position to avoid syncope
Consume full water supply quickly to reset core temperature
Ignore symptoms and tighten gear to stay focused

scenarios.q: Arctic environment. Hands losing sensation during weapon maintenance. Protocol?

options.text: Utilize core body heat for hands; prioritize critical functions
Rub hands together vigorously to force circulation
Continue task quickly before total numbness occurs
Apply chemical heaters directly to skin for rapid warming

scenarios.q: Gas mask deployment in a high-humidity zone. Fogging impeding vision. Response?

options.text: Controlled nasal breathing; use tactile landmarks for movement
Slightly break seal to clear fog with external air
Stop all movement and wait for air quality to improve
Remove mask briefly to clean lens in the contaminated zone

scenarios.q: Rapid ascent/descent in mountainous terrain. Hypoxia risk detected. Action?

options.text: Engage forced-pressure breathing; reduce physical pace
Request supplementary oxygen and hold current altitude
Increase speed to reach lower altitude faster
Hyperventilate to increase oxygen intake immediately

scenarios.q: Target identified inside a place of worship. Hostiles are armed. Decision?

options.text: Establish visual containment; wait for target to exit structure
Deploy non-lethal gas to flush out all occupants
Infiltrate with small team using precision-only weapons
Air strike the structure to ensure target neutralization

scenarios.q: Hostile using a civilian as a human shield. Direct threat to your unit. ROE?

options.text: Reposition for an oblique angle; wait for a clear 100% shot
Fire at the hostile's exposed lower extremities
Hold fire and attempt a high-stress verbal negotiation
Engage both targets to eliminate the threat to the unit

scenarios.q: Wounded enemy soldier reaching for a radio. No medic available. Response?

options.text: Disarm and secure the soldier; apply basic field dressing
Destroy the radio from distance and leave the area
Order the soldier to move away from the device at gunpoint
Eliminate the soldier to prevent intel leak/reinforcements

scenarios.q: Evidence of local friendly forces committing a war crime. Your action?

options.text: Document evidence and report through secure command channels
Intervene physically to stop the action immediately
Discuss the incident with the friendly commander privately
Ignore the event to maintain the tactical alliance

scenarios.q: Electronic warfare alert. GPS signal is showing a 200m offset. Navigation?

options.text: Switch to analog map and compass; verify via terrain features
Reboot the GPS unit and wait for signal re-acquisition
Follow the GPS but apply a manual 200m correction
Continue using GPS; assume the error is a minor glitch

scenarios.q: Smart-gear pinging an unknown Bluetooth attempt. Security status?

options.text: Hard-shutdown all wireless modules; switch to wired comms
Ignore the ping as it is likely civilian interference
Attempt to trace the source of the ping via the HUD
Change the device's name to a deceptive tactical ID

scenarios.q: Drone feed is lagging by 4 seconds during a live breach. Choice?

options.text: Abort the drone-dependent move; use physical point-man
Proceed but move slower to compensate for the lag
Request a second drone to provide an alternate feed
Trust the last clear frame and execute the breach

scenarios.q: Suspected tracking device found on a teammate's gear. Protocol?

options.text: Place tracker on a decoy and move in the opposite direction
Destroy the tracker immediately and continue the mission
Leave the tracker in place to see who comes to retrieve it
Keep the tracker to study its tech after the mission

scenarios.q: Mission completed. Sustained high-cortisol for 48 hours. Recovery?

options.text: Engage in 20min box-breathing and cognitive defusing
Sleep immediately to force physical system recovery
Conduct a high-intensity workout to 'burn off' adrenaline
Use chemical depressants to force a physiological shutdown

scenarios.q: Recurrent intrusive thoughts of a tactical failure. Mental state?

options.text: Tactical de-briefing with focus on objective facts, not guilt
Compartmentalize the memory and focus on the next mission
Discuss feelings with teammates in a non-formal setting
Self-medicate to suppress the recurring imagery

scenarios.q: Difficulty transitioning from tactical 'high-alert' to base life. Action?

options.text: Implement a strict 'decompression' routine (meditation/gym)
Maintain high-alert status to ensure perpetual readiness
Request an immediate return to the field to avoid 'the dip'
Avoid social interaction until the 'edge' wears off naturally

scenarios.q: Unexplained tremors in hands 12 hours after combat. Response?

options.text: Report to medical for neural-overload assessment; hydrate
Hide the tremors to avoid being flagged as 'unfit'
Wait 24 hours to see if they resolve on their own
Increase caffeine intake to 'steady' the nerves
